message:
test: add tests for 5xx retry and delete cache invalidation

- TestServerErrorRetry: verifies 500/502/503/504 are retried with backoff
- TestNonRetriableError: verifies 403 is NOT retried
- TestDeleteIssue_InvalidatesBlockedCache: verifies single delete clears cache
- TestDeleteIssues_InvalidatesBlockedCache: verifies batch delete clears cache
- Update TestFetchIssuesSince_Error with short timeout (500s now retried)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
